title: 7. NG   Points  ( Zu Zhong ) =  Three Weight  =  77.05 / 06 / 07
text:
They are the effective and useful points in the lower extremities that have a wide range
of applications.
For any obstruction or stagnation in the bloodstream and Qi energy of the body,
It is an excellent spleen strengthener, therefore:
  Effective on Increasing the level of immune system.
  Useful in producing and moving vital Qi energy.
 Reduce pain, and relieve weakness and fatigue.
By removing phlegm, it drains the lymphatic vessels, thus facilitating the arrival of
lymphocytes and the body's defense factors to the lungs and local of lesion.
They increase blood flow to the upper body and increase blood flow to the brain.
So they =
 Move Qi & blood
 Clean channels & Luo network
 Beneficial in cases of combined wind & phlegm conditions
 Treat phlegm & Qi binding and stagnation together
